initiatives.name: Brevard Peace Keepers
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through collective organizing in Brevard County. They coordinate direct action support, community defense initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care and resistance.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Melbourne
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Melbourne, Florida. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.
